name: Emily Dolan
text: Setting the primary AI tool was unclear — I didn't see an option to choose a Primary or Secondary tool; I was just given a list of AI tools and asked to click the ones I use. It worked, just unclear about primary vs secondary. (Severity: Low)

name: Emily Dolan
text: During goal selection, mine aren't called 'goals' — they show as 'top tasks.' It worked, but I wasn't sure which was tasks vs goals. (Severity: Low)

name: Emily Dolan
text: The calibration gate questions seem a little judgey, lol.

name: Emily Dolan
text: The 'Find AI for your work' hero loads slowly.

name: Emily Dolan
text: On Home, the Quick actions tile is called 'Ways to Learn' for me — probably fine, just flagging the verbiage was different than expected. (Severity: Low)

name: Emily Dolan
text: In Discovery, only 1 of the use cases is relevant to my role (I did still find one). (Severity: Low)

name: Emily Dolan
text: In Discovery, a case won't open when clicked — it fills in the prompt at the top instead, which is a little confusing. (Severity: Low)

name: Emily Dolan
text: The video lesson plays narration, but it basically just reads what's on the screen.

name: Emily Dolan
text: For Project Quest, I clicked Project Quest but no pop-up appeared, so I picked a lesson available below.

name: Emily Dolan
text: My Calibration re-access: I wasn't able to see my calibration summary — instead it triggered me to retake the calibration. I couldn't see history until I did the calibration again. (Severity: High)

name: Emily Dolan
text: FYI, the narration voice changes slightly during lessons.

name: Emily Dolan
text: Deep Learning lessons took a long time to load and sometimes never fully loaded — I opened one at least 5 times; it only failed once, but it took a long time every time, long enough I worried it would fail. (Severity: High)

name: Emily Dolan
text: First impression: 4/5 — fairly intuitive. Setting the options for the lessons was the most confusing part.
